market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Wall Street is launching the first ever prediction market ETFs for U.S. elections
articles.description: SEC-regulated funds use swaps tied to binary-event contracts and aim to expand access to election trading through retail brokerage accounts.

articles.title: Apple loses bid to pause App Store fee changes as case heads to Supreme Court
articles.description: Apple lost its bid to pause court-ordered App Store payment changes, keeping external purchase links in place as its case with Epic heads toward the Supreme Court.

articles.title: Wall Street is coming to Consensus Miami — and it’s not just to watch
Earth AI is vertically integrating the search for critical minerals
articles.description: When Earth AI started hitting months-long delays in its search for critical minerals, it decided to take matters into its own hands.

articles.title: Stellar’s CMO says crypto must ditch hype and “get rich slow” to win mainstream trust
articles.description: Stellar’s new marketing chief says crypto’s future hinges on long-term value creation, not hype cycles or technical jargon.

articles.title: Andre Cronje says DeFi is ‘no longer DeFi’ as builders debate circuit breakers
articles.description: Flying Tulip’s Andre Cronje says circuit breakers can give teams time to respond during abnormal outflows, while Curve’s Michael Egorov warns they may create new human vulnerabilities.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Litecoin (LTC) gains 2.4%, leading index higher
articles.description: Aptos (APT), up 1.7% since Tuesday, joined Aptos (APT) as a top performer.

articles.title: Firestorm Labs raises $82M to take drone factories into the field
articles.description: A defense startup just raised $82 million to put drone factories inside shipping containers and bring manufacturing to the front lines.

articles.title: BMW i Ventures has a new $300M fund and AI is riding shotgun
articles.description: BMW i Ventures is interested in startups working on agentic AI and physical AI, as well as industrial software, advanced materials, and manufacturing and supply chain technologies.

articles.title: XRP set for ‘strongest’ 2026 monthly ETF inflows as bulls target $2
articles.description: XRP price technicals are favoring a potential rebound to $2.15 as long as support at $1.40 is held, and institutional demand remains elevated.

articles.title: 遭川普盯上！美國半導體設備商被禁止出口中國華虹集團
articles.description: 外媒報導，根據知情人士透露，美國商務部上週已向多家美國半導體設備製造商下達指令，要求停止向中國第二大晶片製造商 […]

articles.title: Meet Shapes, the app bringing humans and AI into the same group chats
articles.description: Think Discord chats, but with AI characters in addition to humans.

articles.title: DeFi shaken by $292 million hack, but showing resilience, Standard Chartered says
articles.description: The AAVE-led response and new safeguards underscore the sector's maturity as the bank maintains its $2 trillion RWA outlook.

articles.title: Securitize, Computershare open path for $70 trillion U.S. stocks to move onchain
articles.description: The tie-up between the tokenization specialist and transfer agent giant lets public companies issue blockchain-based shares without changing market structure.

articles.title: GSR says Crypto Core3 ETF is simple gateway for mainstream investors
articles.description: A new actively managed ETF aims to simplify crypto investing by bundling Bitcoin, Ethereum and Solana into one rebalanced portfolio.

articles.title: Google Translate now lets you practice pronunciation
articles.description: The feature is rolling out in the U.S. and India with support for English, Spanish, and Hindi.

articles.title: ZetaChain dismissed bug report that could have prevented $334K exploit
articles.description: The vulnerability behind ZetaChain's $334,000 exploit had been reported through its bug bounty program before the attack but was dismissed.

articles.title: Galaxy leads $20 million investment in Fence to overhaul back end of $6 trillion credit market
articles.description: Startup Fence uses blockchain technology and tokenization in the background to automate processes that many asset managers still rely on manual workflows.

articles.title: MoonPay acquires Israeli crypto security firm Sodot in $100 million stock deal
articles.description: The acquisition gives MoonPay the security infrastructure for a new institutional business led by former CFTC Acting Chair Caroline Pham.

articles.title: First central bank to test bitcoin says asset is ‘too risky’ for reserves
articles.description: The Czech Central Bank purchased $1 million in bitcoin in October to run tests and conduct a study and found it is more efficient than stocks and gold but much too risky.
